title: CoGame Episode Request
description: Runner-facing request for one cogame episode.

results_uri.description: Destination URI where the runner uploads COGAME_RESULTS_PATH.

replay_uri.description: Optional destination URI where the runner uploads COGAME_SAVE_REPLAY_PATH.

logs_uri.description: Optional destination URI where the runner uploads captured game and policy logs.

EpisodeInput.description: Reusable episode inputs before artifact destinations are assigned by a runner or certifier.

game_config.description: Game-specific config before runner-generated tokens are inserted.

players.description: One player slot per entry, indexed by slot.

image.description: Policy container image to run for this player slot.

initial_params.description: Optional query params appended to the player's websocket URL.
